g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Date' for a discrete scale with 14 values: 01-30, 01-31, 02-01, 02-02, 02-03, ending with 02-12
Y-axis titled 'Views' for a linear scale with values from 0 to 20
Symbol legend for fill color with 5 values: nundinir, skill-issues, opensourceleg, neurobionicspi---vickrey, nundinir.github.io
